description_long: This object consists of four large, wheeled trash bins commonly found in urban environments for waste collection and recycling. Each bin features a rectangular body with a hinged, flat lid and two robust wheels at the rear for easy maneuverability. The bins are colored green, blue, and black, with some displaying prominent recycling symbols and the word 'RECYCLE' on the front. The lids are slightly raised and have molded grip areas for lifting. The handles are integrated into the rear upper edge, allowing for convenient tilting and rolling. The bins are made primarily of durable plastic, suitable for outdoor use and resistant to weathering.
description: A set of four large, wheeled plastic trash bins in green, blue, and black, some marked with recycling symbols and 'RECYCLE' labels. Each bin has a flat hinged lid, integrated rear handle, and two wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view of the bins, showing the green bin in front with its flat lid and wheels visible.
description_view_1: Angled view showing all four bins side by side, highlighting their different colors and the presence of wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view of the bins, focusing on the black bin in front and the wheels and handle design.
description_view_3: Front view of all four bins, clearly displaying the recycling symbols and 'RECYCLE' labels on the black, blue, and green bins.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: recycling symbols and 'RECYCLE' labels on some bins
